mechanics.excerpt: Knlte _ Dagger /Bayonet: Found just about anywhere and easily concealed; the knife perfect melee weapon. Some are weighted to deliver maximum hand-to-hand damage while others are balanced for throwing The bayonet is essentially dagger designed attach to the end of rifle. Sword: Once the weapon of choice for the professional dier; the sword is now little more than an elaborate accouter- ment worn with dress uniform given as special gift.
